content.description: 日本觀光指南】來了日本一定要去一次的景點、看一次的風景、吃一次
content.subtitle: Ariannita la Gringa - Starbucks Coffee Vocabulary
content.title: video_001 title

captions.textEn: Hey guys! It's Ariannita la Gringa and welcome back to my YouTube channel. Can you guys guess
captions.textZhTw: 嗨大家！我是 Ariannita la Gringa，歡迎回到我的 YouTube 頻道。你們猜得到嗎

captions.textEn: where I'm at today? Today I'm at Starbucks and as you can see behind me you can see
captions.textZhTw: 我今天在哪裡嗎？今天我在星巴克，而且你們可以看到我後面有

captions.textEn: the beautiful Starbucks logo that they have. And this logo is famous worldwide. You all
captions.textZhTw: 他們漂亮的星巴克標誌。這個標誌在全世界都很有名。你們大家

captions.textEn: might be wondering... Ariannita why are you at Starbucks? Well today I'm at Starbucks because I
captions.textZhTw: 可能會想說……Ariannita，妳為什麼在星巴克？其實今天我在星巴克是因為我

captions.textEn: want to teach you guys some coffee vocabulary. And you guys might be wondering... Wait it's
captions.textZhTw: 想教你們一些咖啡相關的單字。你們可能會想說……等等，這不是

captions.textEn: really easy to order coffee... Actually, it can be pretty difficult especially at
captions.textZhTw: 點咖啡很簡單嗎……其實，點咖啡可能滿難的，尤其是在

captions.textEn: Starbucks because they have different sizes, different coffee, and different drinks all
captions.textZhTw: 星巴克，因為他們有不同尺寸、不同咖啡，還有各種不同飲品

captions.textEn: together. So come along with me and let's go learn some English vocab inside Starbucks.
captions.textZhTw: 全部混在一起。所以跟我一起來吧，我們進星巴克學一些英文單字。

captions.textEn: Before walking inside this Starbucks store I want to teach you guys some facts about Starbucks.
captions.textZhTw: 在走進這間星巴克之前，我想先教你們一些關於星巴克的小知識。

captions.textEn: The first original Starbucks opened in 1971 in Seattle, Washington. And there are over 33,833
captions.textZhTw: 第一間星巴克在 1971 年於華盛頓州西雅圖開幕。而全球目前有超過 33,833

captions.textEn: stores worldwide. 15,000 of those stores are located right in the United States of America.
captions.textZhTw: 間門市。其中有 15,000 間門市就位在美國。

vocabularyItems.definitionEn: words and phrases related to coffee
vocabularyItems.definitionZhTw: 與咖啡相關的單字和片語

examples.en: Today I want to teach you some coffee vocabulary.
examples.zhTw: 今天我想教你一些咖啡相關的單字。

vocabularyItems.noteZhTw: vocabulary 是「單字、詞彙」的意思，可以用在各種主題，例如 coffee vocabulary、business vocabulary。

vocabularyItems.definitionEn: quite difficult or a little difficult

examples.en: Ordering coffee can be pretty difficult.
examples.zhTw: 點咖啡可能會滿難的。

vocabularyItems.noteZhTw: pretty 在口語裡常用來表示「滿、相當」，不是只有「漂亮」的意思。

vocabularyItems.definitionEn: come with me

examples.en: Come along with me and let's learn some English.
examples.zhTw: 跟我一起來，我們來學一些英文。

vocabularyItems.noteZhTw: come along with me 是影片、旅遊、Vlog 裡很常見的自然說法。

vocabularyItems.definitionEn: information or true details about something
vocabularyItems.definitionZhTw: 關於某件事的事實或資訊

examples.en: I want to teach you some facts about Starbucks.
examples.zhTw: 我想教你一些關於星巴克的小知識。

vocabularyItems.noteZhTw: facts about something 表示「關於某事的事實／小知識」。

vocabularyItems.definitionEn: around the world

examples.en: There are Starbucks stores worldwide.
examples.zhTw: 全球都有星巴克門市。

vocabularyItems.noteZhTw: worldwide 可以當副詞或形容詞，表示「全球的／在全世界」。

content.description: 日本觀光指南】來了日本一定要去一次的景點、看一次的風景、吃一次

captions.textZhTw: 可能會想說……Ariannita，妳為什麼在星巴克？其實今天我在星巴克是因為我

captions.textEn: together. So come along with me and let's go learn some English vocab inside Starbucks.
captions.textZhTw: 全部混在一起。所以跟我一起來吧，我們進星巴克學一些英文單字。

captions.textEn: stores worldwide. 15,000 of those stores are located right in the United States of America.
captions.textZhTw: 間門市。其中有 15,000 間門市就位在美國。

content.subtitle: Ariannita la Gringa - Starbucks Coffee Vocabulary
content.title: music_001 title

captions.textEn: I heard that you're settled down
captions.textZhTw: 我聽說你已安定下來

captions.textEn: That you found a girl
captions.textZhTw: 你找到了一個女孩

captions.textEn: And you're married now
captions.textZhTw: 而且你現在結婚了

captions.textEn: I heard that your dreams came true
captions.textZhTw: 我聽說你的夢想成真了

captions.textEn: Guess she gave you things
captions.textZhTw: 想必她給了你一些東西

captions.textEn: I didn't give to you
captions.textZhTw: 是我沒有給過你的

captions.textEn: Old friend, why are you so shy?
captions.textZhTw: 老朋友，你為何如此靦腆？

captions.textEn: Ain't like you to hold back
captions.textZhTw: 畏縮退怯不像是你的風格

captions.textEn: Or hide from the light
captions.textZhTw: 也不像你會躲避光芒

captions.textEn: I hate to turn up out of the blue uninvited
captions.textZhTw: 我不想這樣突然冒昧登門，不請自來

captions.textEn: But I couldn't stay away, I couldn't fight it
captions.textZhTw: 但我就是無法遠離，我無法抵抗

captions.textEn: I couldn't fight it
captions.textZhTw: 我無法抵抗

captions.textEn: I had hoped you'd see my face
captions.textZhTw: 我曾希望你能看見我的臉

captions.textEn: And that you'd be reminded
captions.textZhTw: 然後你會想起

captions.textEn: That for me it isn't over
captions.textZhTw: 對我來說一切還沒結束

captions.textEn: Never mind, I'll find someone like you
captions.textZhTw: 沒關係，我會找到一個像你一樣的人

captions.textEn: I wish nothing but the best for you, too
captions.textZhTw: 我也只願你一切都好

captions.textEn: Don't forget me, I beg
captions.textZhTw: 請不要忘記我，我懇求你

captions.textEn: I remember you said
captions.textZhTw: 我記得你曾說過

captions.textEn: Sometimes it lasts in love
captions.textZhTw: 有時愛情可以長久

captions.textEn: But sometimes it hurts instead
captions.textZhTw: 但有時它卻帶來傷痛

captions.textEn: Sometimes it lasts in love
captions.textZhTw: 有時愛情可以長久

captions.textEn: But sometimes it hurts instead
captions.textZhTw: 但有時它卻帶來傷痛

captions.textEn: You know how the time flies
captions.textZhTw: 你知道時光是如何飛逝的

captions.textEn: Starbucks because they have different sizes, different coffee, and different drinks all
captions.textZhTw: 星巴克，因為他們有不同尺寸、不同咖啡，還有各種不同飲品

captions.textEn: together. So come along with me and let's go learn some English vocab inside Starbucks.
captions.textZhTw: 全部混在一起。所以跟我一起來吧，我們進星巴克學一些英文單字。

captions.textEn: Before walking inside this Starbucks store I want to teach you guys some facts about Starbucks.
captions.textZhTw: 在走進這間星巴克之前，我想先教你們一些關於星巴克的小知識。

captions.textEn: The first original Starbucks opened in 1971 in Seattle, Washington. And there are over 33,833
captions.textZhTw: 第一間星巴克在 1971 年於華盛頓州西雅圖開幕。而全球目前有超過 33,833

captions.textEn: stores worldwide. 15,000 of those stores are located right in the United States of America.
captions.textZhTw: 間門市。其中有 15,000 間門市就位在美國。

vocabularyItems.definitionEn: words and phrases related to coffee
vocabularyItems.definitionZhTw: 與咖啡相關的單字和片語

examples.en: Today I want to teach you some coffee vocabulary.
examples.zhTw: 今天我想教你一些咖啡相關的單字。

vocabularyItems.noteZhTw: vocabulary 是「單字、詞彙」的意思，可以用在各種主題，例如 coffee vocabulary、business vocabulary。

vocabularyItems.definitionEn: quite difficult or a little difficult

examples.en: Ordering coffee can be pretty difficult.
examples.zhTw: 點咖啡可能會滿難的。

vocabularyItems.noteZhTw: pretty 在口語裡常用來表示「滿、相當」，不是只有「漂亮」的意思。

vocabularyItems.definitionEn: come with me

examples.en: Come along with me and let's learn some English.
examples.zhTw: 跟我一起來，我們來學一些英文。

vocabularyItems.noteZhTw: come along with me 是影片、旅遊、Vlog 裡很常見的自然說法。

vocabularyItems.definitionEn: information or true details about something
vocabularyItems.definitionZhTw: 關於某件事的事實或資訊

examples.en: I want to teach you some facts about Starbucks.
examples.zhTw: 我想教你一些關於星巴克的小知識。

vocabularyItems.noteZhTw: facts about something 表示「關於某事的事實／小知識」。

vocabularyItems.definitionEn: around the world

examples.en: There are Starbucks stores worldwide.
examples.zhTw: 全球都有星巴克門市。

vocabularyItems.noteZhTw: worldwide 可以當副詞或形容詞，表示「全球的／在全世界」。
